title: Mustardy Egyptian Egg Rolls Fried-Rice
description: A flavorful and crowd-pleasing dish featuring egg rolls, coconut cream, and a hint of mustard. This sattvic-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Egg roll wrappers
ingredients.notes: You can make your own or use store-bought

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the thawed peas and carrots and cooked rice to the skillet. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the mustard seeds and coconut cream. Add to the skillet and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Add the egg roll wrappers to the skillet and break them up into small pieces. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the fried rice mixture to a serving platter or individual plates.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
If desired, serve in small egg rolls for an added presentation touch.
